title: OREGON STATE REHABILITATION COUNCIL - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OREGON STATE REHABILITATION COUNCIL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The purpose of the Oregon State Rehabilitation Council is to provide the Vocational Rehabilitation (VR) with an external, consumer-oriented perspective. The Council advises VR on the needs of Oregonians with disabilities concerning programs, policy, services and other issues. 500 Summer Street NE Suite E87 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (503) 945-6256 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 945-6256 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information or for meeting schedule FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Disability Rights Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
